additional_rules.description: Celebrity 10K Grant — up to $10,000 closing cost assistance for FHA loans. Property must be in MMCT (Minority > 50%) or LMI tract. Free money, not a lien, no rate increase.
additional_rules.no_current_property: Borrower may NOT hold ownership interest in another property at closing
additional_rules.income_limit_150_mfi: Standard path: borrower income ≤150% MFI (requires MMCT or LMIT)
additional_rules.income_limit_200_mfi: First generation homebuyer path: ≤200% MFI (requires MMCT or LMIT)
additional_rules.income_limit_80_mfi: LMI borrower path: ≤80% MFI (no MMCT/LMIT location requirement)
additional_rules.grant_funds_ipc: Grant funds are considered IPC, max 6%

general_notes: GMCC Celebrity 10K Grant provides up to $10,000 in closing cost assistance for FHA loans.
The grant is free money — not a lien, no payback required, no rate increase.
Available in specific counties in CA, MA, GA, NC, and SC.
Property must be in a Majority-Minority Census Tract (MMCT: minority > 50%) OR Low-to-Moderate Income Tract (LMIT).
Exception: LMI borrowers (income ≤80% MFI) have no MMCT/LMIT location requirement — only county eligibility applies.
FHA only, 30-year fixed only. Purchase transactions only. Owner occupied.
Property types: SFR, 2-4 Units, PUD, FHA-approved condos (new condo projects not eligible).
Min LTV 80% — this grant is for underserved borrowers who need closing cost help.
Borrower cannot own another property at closing. Non-occupant co-borrower not allowed.
Grant funds are considered IPC (max 6%). Cannot be used for borrower minimum contribution or reserves.
Max gift fund allowed is 10% of purchase price.
No exception, no rush, no more than 3 touches per file.
